assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response clearly identifies 2 dev clusters on Rapid channel and 2 prod clusters on Stable channel, includes channel-specific commands and considerations throughout both checklists

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions no SSH access to nodes, automatic node pool management, and mandatory resource requests with specific validation commands

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Provides specific kubectl commands for checking deprecated API usage including metrics endpoint and deprecation insights dashboard

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Highlights resource requests as mandatory with specific validation commands and identifies this as the #1 cause of post-upgrade issues in Autopilot

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Includes specific checks for PDBs configuration, bare pods detection, and terminationGracePeriodSeconds validation with corresponding kubectl commands

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud commands to verify control plane version and includes multi-cluster verification loop

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Comprehensive workload health section covering deployments, pods, StatefulSets, ingress controllers, and health checks with specific kubectl commands

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Specifically mentions using dev clusters on Rapid as early validation and validates compatibility in dev environment before prod upgrade

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: States '~4 weeks from when 1.32 reaches Regular channel to when it auto-upgrades in Stable' providing timeline context beyond just the 72h notification
Includes monitoring dashboards, baseline metrics, performance validation, error rates, API latency, and observability checks in both pre and post-upgrade sections

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Only mentions maintenance exclusions for control plane upgrades, explicitly states node management is automatic, and focuses on control plane upgrade timing only
